profile.name: Jether Haniel De Leon
profile.title: Full Stack Developer & System Engineer
profile.tagline: Building enterprise-grade applications from the database layer to the user's screen — 4 years of full-stack experience.
profile.bio: Versatile IT professional with 4 years of experience building and maintaining enterprise-grade applications across the full development stack. Proficient in JavaScript, C#, and SQL, with hands-on experience developing BI dashboards, data-driven reporting systems, RESTful/SOAP API integrations, and responsive web interfaces. I enjoy working across the stack — from optimizing SQL queries to crafting polished, mobile-first UIs.

projects.title: Spendie
projects.description: A cross-platform shared budget tracker with spaces for group expenses, recurring transactions, net worth tracking, achievements, Google OAuth, and full PWA support.

projects.title: Chikie
projects.description: A self-hosted encrypted real-time messaging platform for private team networks. Features AES-256-GCM message encryption, read receipts, push notifications, and presence tracking.

projects.title: Plately
projects.description: A full-stack meal planning app with weekly recipe scheduling, ingredient cost tracking, and grocery expense management — built for individuals managing household meals.

projects.title: Activity Planning
projects.description: An internal workflow tool that digitizes Excel-based activity management with RACI matrix assignment, multi-stage approval workflows, progress tracking, and Excel/PDF export.

experience.description: Developed and customized full-stack enterprise applications using JavaScript, C#, and web technologies — delivering end-to-end features from the database layer to user-facing dashboards, BI reports, and automation workflows.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology
